channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light not working, 4th April
item.description:
A street light on Philip Walk is not working at night - please can it be fixed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Philip Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping beside cycle hanger, 4th April
item.description:
Fly tipping beside cycle hanger

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlisle Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on telecoms cabinet on Elmstead Lane (close to junction with Wood Drive)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In-ground trampolines broken, 4th April
item.description:
One of the in-ground trampolines at Whitehall Recreation Playground is broken and has been fenced off for almost a whole year. Please can this be fixed so our children can enjoy the playground again?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere pedestrian square, 4th April
item.description:
Mattress tv etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 4th April
item.description:
There are plastic bags, cans, plastic bags, paper, food packaging and coffee cups on the road and pavement alongside the park and the side of the Student accommodation. It has been there are four days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Great Dover Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on lamppost 31E16 on Elmstead Lane (close to 20 Elmstead Lane 'Woodcote')

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 4th April
item.description:
There is toilet paper, paper, coffee cups, food packaging and plastic bottles on the pavement and road along Beckett house and park. It has been there for four days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park being used by motorbikes, 4th April
item.description:
Park still being used by motor bikes, the signs that were put up have been ripped down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Oaks, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bags, 4th April
item.description:
A number of fly tipped rubbish bags have been dumped in front of a garage by the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haydens Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nuisance lighting, 4th April
item.description:
Re-reporting this issue after many failed attempts. This lighting is a nuisance - very sensitive and not up to building code. Please contact me for further information with this on-going case.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glebe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glebe Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti on Council block at 63 Darwin Street, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on two sides of pramsheds by 63 Darwin Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darwin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bins, 4th April
item.description:
Missing bins for flats in Anstridge Road, SE9. Ongoing for some time. Attracting young people who are smoking drugs and leaving urine and used condoms in enclosed bin area to flats in Anstridge Road overlooking Wayfield Link on both sides especially the side opposite the Youth club at times about 10-15 kids are hanging about on nearby Youth Club nights and non youth club nights. This problem is increasing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anstridge Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Dog Poo/Fouling problem has been found, 4th April
item.description:
A Dog Poo/Fouling problem has been found by Hackney Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warburton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anstridge road pathway, 4th April
item.description:
Over spilling of rubbish especially at weekends Not sure if emptying them regularly normally rubbish all over the footpath Fly tipping is normally beside the bins at Anstridge Path near the hall Ongoing, solution another bin in the middle of path, not sure or regularly been emptied the otherwise if the path is opposite Avery Hill Park and pathway is used by alot of people

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anstridge Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken drain pipe Myers house, 4th April
item.description:
Outside no7 Myers house a drain pipe has broken and fallen off so is not draining properly and leaking into bin store

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sir John Kirk Close, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
